title: senecio subsinuatus
intro: Senecio subsinuatus, also known as Round-leaf Ragwort, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Senecio subsinuatus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce swelling, and promote overall well-being. Senecio subsinuatus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties in a safe and controlled manner.
